path.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 102px; margin-left: 7px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: nowrap;

div.div:
- unidadDAO: IUnidadDAO
- gastoDAO: IGastoDAO
- liquidacionDAO: ILiquidacionDAO+ liquidarPeriodo(id, per): boolean
+ obtenerDetalle(idLiq): List

div.div:

+ verificarEstado(id, per): String
